summary: Phase 33 frontend testing complete. New SRD 5.1 Equipment Reference Tab works correctly across all sections (Weapons / Armor / Gear / Properties), all filter chips and search behave as specified, and the redundant 'Dice' tab has been confirmed removed from the GMScreen REFERENCE group. All 13 regression GM tabs (Combat, Location, Events, NPCs, NPC Network, Party, Monsters, Tables, Loot, Notes, Story Arcs, AI Planner, Soundboard) continue to render without console errors.

test_results.sidebar_reference_group: PASS — REFERENCE group shows Tables / Equipment / Loot. NO 'Dice' button present.
test_results.section_tabs_present: PASS — eq-section-weapons, eq-section-armor, eq-section-gear, eq-section-properties all rendered.
test_results.filter_finesse: PASS — Dagger, Rapier, Scimitar, Shortsword all present (each = 1).
test_results.filter_thrown: PASS — Javelin, Handaxe, Dart all present.
test_results.search_sword: PASS — only Greatsword, Longsword, Shortsword visible. Clearing returns 37 weapons.
test_results.armor_section: PASS — Leather, Scale mail, Chain mail, Shield rows all rendered. Table has 7 columns: NAME, COST, AC, STR, STEALTH, WEIGHT, DON.
test_results.gear_section: PASS — Backpack, Rations (1 day), Healer's kit rendered. Search 'rope' returns Rope hempen + Rope silk only.
test_results.properties_section: PASS — Finesse, Thrown, Two-Handed, Versatile blocks all rendered.
test_results.live_session_equipment_link: PASS — /gm-screen route IS the live session view; Equipment button is present in sidebar's REFERENCE group and opens the Equipment tab.
test_results.regression_other_tabs: PASS — all 13 other GM tabs clickable with zero console errors.

critical_code_review_comments: EquipmentReferenceTab.js (~308 LOC) is well-scoped, uses useMemo for derived lists, and correctly handles property filtering via case-insensitive substring match. No issues.
srdEquipment.js cleanly separates data from UI; ALL_WEAPONS / FINESSE_WEAPONS / etc. are derived once at module load — efficient.

Minor nit: WEAPON_PROPERTIES does not include a 'Versatile' entry name mismatch — the data-testid uses the original property name with hyphen ('property-Two-Handed') which matches the data, so test selectors work. No action needed.
GMScreen import of DiceRoller was removed cleanly; no dangling references.
context_for_next_testing_agent: GMScreen at /gm-screen/:campaignId is the LiveSessionMode view. Sidebar groups: COMBAT / WORLD / CHARACTERS / REFERENCE / SESSION. REFERENCE contains Tables / Equipment / Loot. Equipment data-testids: equipment-reference-tab, eq-section-{weapons|armor|gear|properties}, eq-filter-{all|simple|martial|finesse|thrown|two-handed|light}, eq-search-input, weapon-row-{Name}, armor-row-{Name}, gear-row-{Name}, property-{Name}.
